name: peoplesoft-graphql-starter
description: Next.js + Apollo GraphQL BFF with mock PeopleSoft data (swap to Integration Broker REST)

scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.dev:mock-ps: concurrently -n mock-ps,backend,frontend -c magenta,blue,green "npm run mock-ib --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix frontend
